name: Clip maker
short_description: Clip Maker is a creative tool for making videos, animations, visual novels, comics & VR scenes. Easy to use, packed with assets, and exportable in 4K, 8K, VR, GIF, and more.
detailed_description:
🎬 Clip Maker – The Ultimate Creative Tool 🎭

Clip Maker is a sandbox video and animation creation tool that lets anyone make videos, visual novels, comics, machinima, VR movies, and more — without pro skills required.

Build scenes, control characters, add effects, and export in 4K, 8K, VR, GIF, or MP4. Whether you want an anime music video, a machinima short, or a visual novel cutscene, Clip Maker gives you the tools to bring your ideas to life.

🛠️ Key Features

  • Create videos, animations, comics, wallpapers, VR movies

  • Export in MP4, ProRes, GIF, PNG, transparent video & more

  • Timeline editor with camera, lighting, VFX & audio control

  • Character customization: animations, poses, clothing, makeup, emotions

  • 13 starter characters + thousands of poses, props, prefabs, and animations

  • FREE DLC with thousands of extra animations & assets

🤖 Import & Integration

  • Works with VRoid, MMD, DAZ3D, FBX, Poser, and more

  • Import images, audio, and videos into your projects

  • Stream directly to YouTube, Twitch, or Facebook

  • Webcam & microphone integration for recording

🎨 Creative Freedom

  • No limits on scenes, characters, or props

  • Green screen, chroma key, video converters included

  • Build everything from memes and GIFs to serious animation projects

  • Perfect for machinima creators, VTubers, visual novel devs, or just for fun

✨ Why Clip Maker?

  • Easy to use interface with tutorials in multiple languages

  • Full ownership: everything you create is 100% yours

  • Endless creative possibilities — from simple GIFs to cinematic VR projects

Clip Maker isn’t just a tool.
It’s your creative playground.

Go make something amazing — or ridiculous. Both work.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
